rationale: Educ. Code §37.354 governs use of school safety and security funding. It has no operative connection to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount.
quote: The commissioner may authorize a school district to use money provided to the district for the purpose of improving school safety and security
_note: No conflict identified. This statute addresses school safety funding usage, not property tax exemptions or school funding formulas tied to homestead values.
